gamma.help: Brightness and contrast calibration. This sets how bright the picture looks; it does not affect gameplay. Adjust the brightness and contrast sliders below if you want, or just choose Continue to accept the current setting and proceed. You can also change it later under graphics settings.
group.cant_close: Can't close yet — choose a valid party first.
worldmap.travel_paused: Travel paused. Press Enter to continue.
char.name: Name: {value}

wizard.step_unavailable: This step is not accessible yet.
wizard.speech.backend_help: Pick the engine that reads this mod aloud. Selecting one plays a sample so you can hear it. You can change this any time from the menu.
wizard.speech.sample: This is {name}. If you can hear this, speech is working.
wizard.nav.title: Movement
wizard.nav.help: Pathfinder: Wrath of the Righteous is an isometric crpg. As such it takes place in a continuous 3d space. There are two modes of exploration supported: continuous and tiled movement. Continuous mode allows you to move a cursor around the space as if moving a mouse cursor (but not entirely similar, the cursor is in the world itself.) tiled mode overlays a grid on top of the continuous space instead, allowing you to treat it like a grid-based game (or as if you're using a tactical grid in a tabletop session.) The game works best in continuous mode, but choose the one that feels most comfortable for you. This can be changed from the settings at any time.
wizard.walltones.title: Wall tones
wizard.walltones.help: Wall tones play directional sound to indicate the presence and distance of walls in each of the 4 cardinal directions (north, south, east, and west.)
wizard.sonar.title: Sonar
wizard.sonar.help: The sonar is a system that sonifies your surrounding environment. Objects of specific types will play a corresponding sound periodically, allowing you to determine where they are in relation to your movement cursor. Note that there are areas in the game with many units in view at once (in excess of 50 or more), so keep this in mind if enabling everything
wizard.events.title: Event feedback
wizard.events.help: How should events be conveyed? Things like damage, healing, and spell effects happen in and out of combat, and the game's log reports the same things — so the wizard sets up one channel and quietens the other. Positional speech is the most immediate but needs SAPI; the others use your screen reader. You can fine-tune all of this later under Events and Log.
wizard.events.enemy_voice_help: Tune the voice for enemy events. Pick a voice distinct from your ally and main voices, so you can tell at a glance whether an event is an enemy's. Test it below.
wizard.events.ally_voice_help: Tune the voice for your party's (and neutral NPCs') events — a voice distinct from the enemy one. Test it below.
wizard.events.unitless_voice_help: Tune the voice for events with no source on the map — things like time passing or party-wide effects. These have no position, so they're always spoken non-positionally; give them a voice distinct from the enemy and ally voices so you can tell a sourceless event apart. Test it below.
chargen.phase_unavailable: This phase is not accessible yet.
chargen.spells_auto: This class knows all its spells automatically.
chargen.no_spells_at_level: No spells known at this level.
tutorial.title: Tutorial
text.help: Type to edit, Backspace to delete, Enter to confirm, Escape to cancel.
desc.shieldmaze_hall.title: The Hall of Cruel Comforts
desc.shieldmaze_hall.body: A broad, high-ceilinged hall floored in ornate mosaic, bands of diamond tile ringing great circular medallions. It is warmly lit by iron candle-ring chandeliers, tall candelabra, and wall torches spilling gold light over deep red carpets. Pale banners bearing a red sigil line the walls, some streaked with old blood. It is furnished for indulgence: a great hexagonal table crowded with the leavings of a feast and jewel-bright glassware, a harp and a music stand, framed paintings on the far wall, fine rugs and stray urns. But the comfort is a mask. At its heart the floor is dark with bloodstains, and cushioned benches are drawn up around them like seats for an audience. Whoever kept this place took their pleasure in watching others suffer, entertained by wine and music while blood dried on the tiles.
desc.shieldmaze_dormitory.title: The Sleeping Quarters
desc.shieldmaze_dormitory.body: A dim, barracks-like room lined with a row of simple wooden beds and pale bedding, a nightstand and a chair among them. Banners with the same red sigil hang on the walls. At the far end a raised dais holds a small shrine lit an eerie green, braziers of green flame flanking a statue, their glow washing cold over the stone. A place where the faithful slept close to whatever it was they served.
desc.shieldmaze_storeroom.title: The Storeroom
desc.shieldmaze_storeroom.body: A cramped, neglected storage room, cobwebs strung across its corners. Barrels stand stacked against wooden shelves and bookcases crowded with odds and ends, jugs and cups, a chest and a casket among luxury goods set aside and forgotten. A red-sigil banner hangs above the checkered stone floor. Little light reaches here; it smells of dust and disuse.
desc.shieldmaze_armory_hall.title: The Armory Hall
desc.shieldmaze_armory_hall.body: A grand hall of dressed stone, its floor inlaid with a wide panel of patterned tile like a training ground. Pale banners marked with the red sigil hang between racks of polearms and mounted shields, and armored stands hold suits of mail along the walls. A golden candle-wheel burns low on its chains beside a table spread with parchment and guttering candles, the flames throwing long shadows across the weapon racks. Chests and cupboards stand against the walls, and a small door waits beside a strange device set into the stone.
desc.shieldmaze_armory_store.title: The Armory Store
desc.shieldmaze_armory_store.body: A cramped armory closet behind a stout, lockable door. Weapon stands and an armor stand line the walls, and iron-bound chests sit against the stone, among them a heavy banded trunk. A lone torch burns in its bracket, its light catching on scattered metal across the rough floor. The cult's arms, kept close and kept locked.
desc.shieldmaze_banner_crossing.title: The Banner Crossing
desc.shieldmaze_banner_crossing.body: A quiet chamber floored with dark inlaid tilework, old shields mounted on the walls between pale banners of the red sigil. A robed stone figure stands beside a burning torch bracket, and several doorways lead out. Among the patterned tiles a trap plate waits underfoot for the unwary.
desc.shieldmaze_banner_passage.title: A Guarded Passage
desc.shieldmaze_banner_passage.body: A passage floored in patterned tile, its walls hung with pale banners bearing the red sigil and lit by torch brackets, small wooden doors standing beneath arched frames at either end. Here too a trap lies hidden beneath the tiles, waiting for a careless step.
desc.shieldmaze_bare_alcove.title: A Bare Alcove
desc.shieldmaze_bare_alcove.body: A shallow pocket of stone opening off the scaffold-filled chamber, empty of any furnishing. Torchlight from the timber frames beyond barely reaches across its bare flagstones.
desc.shieldmaze_bare_cavern.title: A Bare Cavern
desc.shieldmaze_bare_cavern.body: A rough natural chamber of broken rock, its floor cracked like dried mud. Knots of pale mushrooms glow faint blue and violet along the walls — the only light in the dark.
desc.shieldmaze_broad_stair.title: The Broad Stair
desc.shieldmaze_broad_stair.body: A broad flight of worn stone steps joins two levels of the maze, its walls bare and dark. Torches gutter at the landing, where an iron grate is set into the cracked tiles and a dried smear of blood trails across the stone.
desc.shieldmaze_builders_hall.title: The Builders' Hall
desc.shieldmaze_builders_hall.body: A broad hall floored with a great circle of concentric stone rings, grooved and tracked like the workings of some enormous mechanism. Wooden scaffolding still towers along the walls, planks and sacks stacked where work simply stopped, candles guttering in tall iron stands. A white banner bearing the red sigil hangs on the stonework, and tall doors carved with demonic figures lead deeper in. Beside a heavy wooden winch-wheel lie the corpses of the maze's own builders, sprawled where they were cut down, their blood dried black across the flagstones. Whatever they finished building here, they were not meant to leave it.
desc.shieldmaze_button_court.title: The Arched Door
desc.shieldmaze_button_court.body: A stone forecourt before an arched wooden door, a single torch burning in its bracket beside the frame. Crates and boxes stand stacked against the walls, a long rack runs beneath shuttered window arches, and a weapon stand leans in the shadows.
desc.shieldmaze_cavern_crossing.title: The Cavern Crossing
desc.shieldmaze_cavern_crossing.body: A smaller pocket of cave joining the larger fungal chambers, its floor a crazed mosaic of dried, cracked mud. Green cup fungi and blue puffballs sprout along the walls, and swollen purple growths glow dimly against the rock. Passages open out of the gloom at either end.
desc.shieldmaze_cavern_lake.title: The Cavern Lake
desc.shieldmaze_cavern_lake.body: A vast natural cavern, the widest of these caves, its dry cracked floor dotted with glowing growths — stacked towers of violet shelf-fungus and fat blue caps nodding on pale stalks. At one end the darkness opens onto a broad underground pool, black water rippling faintly, glowing mushrooms and tumbled rocks crowding its shore. At the other, the cave runs up against the temple's outer wall of dressed stone, a red-sigil banner pale against the masonry.
desc.shieldmaze_ceremonial_hall.title: The Ceremonial Hall
desc.shieldmaze_ceremonial_hall.body: A long ceremonial hall floored in checkered stone inlaid with circular mosaic medallions, a worn red carpet running its length atop a low stepped platform. Iron wheel-chandeliers hang burning overhead, their open flames throwing slow shadows across the tiles, while shields and torch sconces line the walls above a wooden bench. Against one wall a heap of broken timber and rubble marks an old collapse, dust still thick around it. Cupboards, chests, and a crowded bookshelf stand about the edges of the room, and stray embers drift and gutter on the floor.
desc.shieldmaze_chapel_hall.title: The Chapel Hall
desc.shieldmaze_chapel_hall.body: A long hall arranged like a chapel: rows of dark wooden pews flank a red patterned carpet running the length of the floor, and iron candle-wheels hang from the ceiling on chains — one lies fallen amid broken masonry and rubble. An ornate round mosaic is inlaid in the flagstones. A luxurious casket rests among the pews. At one end a short stair climbs to a heavy door, a dried bloodstain darkening the flags nearby. A congregation gathered here, and it did not worship anything kind.
desc.shieldmaze_corpse_pit.title: The Corpse Pit
desc.shieldmaze_corpse_pit.body: A torture chamber floored in ornate patterned stone, its tiles inset with iron grates to drain what spills here. In the middle of the room a brick-lined pit drops away, heaped with mangled remains that glisten a wet red in the dark. Beside it stands a great spoked breaking wheel taller than a man, and a workbench cluttered with the torturers' tools sits against the wall under hanging chains. On the floor, someone has arranged bones into the shape of a sacred symbol. The whole room smells of old blood and rust.
desc.shieldmaze_council_hall.title: The Council Hall
desc.shieldmaze_council_hall.body: A grand hall floored in broad flagstones inlaid with circular medallions, a gilded wheel chandelier blazing overhead. On a dark red carpet stands a heavy six-sided table ringed with high-backed chairs, its top crowded with candlesticks, plates, flasks, and a jug — a meeting place, not a mess. Tall candelabra burn along the walls between white banners marked with the red sigil, and framed paintings hang in the gloom: a walled city on the water, a couple dancing in golden finery. Doorways lead out in several directions.
desc.shieldmaze_crate_closet.title: The Crate Closet
desc.shieldmaze_crate_closet.body: A cramped storage closet crowded with wooden crates and boxes stacked one atop another in the dark. A single plain door leads back out.
desc.shieldmaze_crate_passage.title: The Cluttered Passage
desc.shieldmaze_crate_passage.body: A wide, dark passage choked with storage: wooden crates and simple boxes stacked shoulder-high, a pair of barrels shoved against a rough stone wall, a cauldron and clutter left where they fell. Torch brackets glow dimly over the damp flagstones, and several doorways lead off through heavy wooden doors.
desc.shieldmaze_curving_gallery.title: The Curving Gallery
desc.shieldmaze_curving_gallery.body: A long passage bending in a slow arc between high walls of pale brick, its floor stepping gradually downward as it goes. A lone torch gutters in a bracket along the curve, and a heavy door waits at either end of the arc.
desc.shieldmaze_flooded_den.title: The Flooded Den
desc.shieldmaze_flooded_den.body: A broad hall where shallow water sheets across the flagstones, shimmering orange and cold blue under the torch brackets. Someone has been living here: a rack of shelves still holds plates and dishes, crates and a strongbox sit half-soaked in the wet, and a heap of straw is mounded against the wall like a nest. An ornamented traveler's pack lies abandoned among the clutter. A heavy wooden door stands open in its arch, water lapping at the threshold.
desc.shieldmaze_flooded_hall.title: The Flooded Hall
desc.shieldmaze_flooded_hall.body: Dark water sheets across the floor of this wide, rough-walled hall, rippling and glinting wherever firelight touches it — a burst water pipe high on the wall has been leaking here for a long time. An iron ring-chandelier hangs low over the flood, its torches still burning. Crates and simple wooden boxes stand stacked on the drier ground, and planking laid over the muck leads to a heavy wooden door set in an arched frame. Everything smells of wet stone and rot.
desc.shieldmaze_flooded_workshop.title: The Flooded Workshop
desc.shieldmaze_flooded_workshop.body: A wide hall where the floor lies awash, black water sheeted over mud and broken stone so that every torch flame burns twice. Rough carpenters' work clutters one side — a planked ramp, ladders of lashed scaffolding, barrels and crates abandoned mid-job. On the wet flagstones a corpse lies sprawled in a dark slick of its own blood. Several doorways lead out.
desc.shieldmaze_fungal_grove.title: The Fungal Grove
desc.shieldmaze_fungal_grove.body: A cave chamber overgrown with enormous fungi: towers of stacked violet shelf-caps climb higher than a person, glowing softly, with puffballs and slender pale stalks scattered across the cracked stone around them. Along one side the raw rock gives way to the temple's dressed-stone wall, where a sigil-marked banner hangs and candlelight flickers at its edge. The air here is thick with spores and the cold light of the mushrooms.
desc.shieldmaze_gallery.title: The Gallery of Paintings
desc.shieldmaze_gallery.body: A balcony gallery curving above the great hall, startlingly fine for this place: a red patterned carpet, standing candelabras with lit candles, and iron candle-wheels hanging out over the stone rail. Framed paintings hang along the curved wall — green landscapes and open skies in gilt frames. Below the rail, the hall's great circled floor spreads away into the gloom. Someone furnished this room with care, and it is hard to say which is worse: the maze's cruelty, or its comfort.
desc.shieldmaze_gate_antechamber.title: Before the Iron Gate
desc.shieldmaze_gate_antechamber.body: An antechamber ending at a portcullis of black iron, torches blazing on a wooden rail beside it. Pale banners marked with the red sigil hang against the brick, and a snarling face in relief juts from the wall. A square iron grate sits flush in the checkered floor tiles, and nearby lies a scatter of old bones, a sacred symbol still among them. The light dies quickly here, and the corners stay black.
desc.shieldmaze_glowing_grotto.title: The Glowing Grotto
desc.shieldmaze_glowing_grotto.body: A broad cave chamber lit only by the things growing in it. Purple shelf fungi climb a column of rock in ragged tiers, and patches of pale green cup-shaped fungi stand open like tiny goblets among sprigs of blue luminescence scattered across the floor. Underfoot the ground is dry, cracked dirt, littered with stones. Everything here glows faintly, and nothing here was planted by human hands.
desc.shieldmaze_grand_hall.title: The Grand Hall
desc.shieldmaze_grand_hall.body: A broad ceremonial hall floored in patterned grey stone, diamond checks and great circular medallions worked into the tiles. A long red carpet runs the length of the room toward a tall arched doorway, and the walls carry heraldic shield plaques and a banner marked with the red sigil. Candles burn everywhere — on tall standing candelabras, on a long side table, and on a massive iron candle-wheel that looms low near one wall. In a shadowed alcove a horned statue stands half-hidden: Baphomet's likeness, kept where a casual glance would miss it. A wooden chest rests near a small side door.
desc.shieldmaze_great_hall.title: The Great Hall
desc.shieldmaze_great_hall.body: A vast, echoing hall on the maze's lowest level, its stone reaches swallowed by darkness. Stairways climb from here toward a candlelit gallery above. In one wall stands a heavy exit door, and beyond it a stair leads up and out of the maze, toward the surface and open air.
desc.shieldmaze_hidden_armory.title: The Hidden Armory
desc.shieldmaze_hidden_armory.body: A small brick-walled armory, crowded for its size. A long weapon rack stands beside a suit of half-plate mounted on a stand, with crates and a stout chest pushed against the walls. A chain-pull mechanism hangs near one corner, the opener for a secret door set so cleanly into the stonework that the wall seems solid until it moves. Red-sigil banners and torches mark the walls just outside.
desc.shieldmaze_hidden_pantry.title: The Hidden Pantry
desc.shieldmaze_hidden_pantry.body: A concealed storage passage behind a secret door, floored in grey checkered tile. Tall dark shelves crowd the space, stacked with folded linens, crates, jars, and papers, a few candles still burning low among the stores. Spears lean in a rack beside a barrel, and stout chests sit tucked between the shelving. Whatever was worth keeping was kept here, out of sight.
desc.shieldmaze_holding_pen.title: The Holding Pen
desc.shieldmaze_holding_pen.body: Broken stone and rubble lie scattered across the floor of this dim chamber. Rough wooden benches stand beneath banners marked with the red sigil, an iron cage waits in the shadows against one wall, and candles on tall iron stands shed a meagre light. The air is heavy with an animal reek.
desc.shieldmaze_idol_chamber.title: The Idol Chamber
desc.shieldmaze_idol_chamber.body: A high square chamber at the heart of the maze. From a stepped dais at its center rises a bronze statue of a winged demon, a pronged staff in its grip, set within a great ring worked into the tiled floor. Banners bearing the red sigil hang on every wall, and drifts of votive candles burn along the floor, their wax pooling on the stones. Doors carved with demonic figures lead out in several directions; a torturer's table and a scattering of wooden crates stand against the walls, and an iron grate lies flush with the floor.
desc.shieldmaze_kitchen.title: The Kitchen
desc.shieldmaze_kitchen.body: A cramped kitchen thick with shadow. Great barrels lie racked on their sides against the wall, a ladder leaning among them, and a shelf of clay pots and jugs hangs above a stone stove and washbasins. A low table still holds the remains of a meal: plates, cups, scraps, and a basket of dried fish. An iron candle-wheel lies toppled on the grimy floor, its candles long dead, and a stout box sits tucked in a corner.
desc.shieldmaze_kitchen_hall.title: The Kitchen Hall
desc.shieldmaze_kitchen_hall.body: A broad, murky hall that served the maze as a kitchen. The flagstones glisten with damp, many of them cracked and heaved out of true, and an unlit iron chandelier ring hangs from the dark overhead. A long table stands laid with plates, bowls, and the leavings of interrupted meals. One corner is given over to stores: wooden shelves with a ladder leaning against them, stacked crates and barrels, clay jugs and a great basket, all in the guttering light of a single wall torch. The air carries old grease and colder things beneath it.
desc.shieldmaze_library.title: The Library
desc.shieldmaze_library.body: A studious hall gone to ruin. Tall bookcases crowd the walls, their shelves packed tight, while loose pages lie scattered across the carpeted floor as if the room were ransacked in a hurry. A chandelier ring burns low on its chains above reading tables strewn with open books and dribbling candles, and candelabra flicker in the corners. Two paintings brighten the stone: a sunlit street of brick houses, and a green woodland glade. Cupboards and a lockable chest stand among the shelves, and a small door sits beside a device worked into the wall.
desc.shieldmaze_long_stair.title: The Long Stair
desc.shieldmaze_long_stair.body: A broad stone staircase descends between bare walls, its worn steps lit by a single torch burning in a sconce near the bottom. An arched doorway stands at the top; below, the steps give onto cold flagstones.
desc.shieldmaze_mess_hall.title: The Mess Hall
desc.shieldmaze_mess_hall.body: The maze's dining hall, warm with the light of a burning wheel chandelier. Long wooden tables ringed with high-backed chairs stand over a patterned tile floor, still set with plates, bowls, and half-finished meals, as if the eaters left in a hurry. Shelves along the walls hold stacked crockery, bottles, and jugs, with barrels tucked beneath. Framed paintings hang about the room — landscapes, strangely fine for a soldiers' canteen.
desc.shieldmaze_mushroom_cavern.title: The Mushroom Cavern
desc.shieldmaze_mushroom_cavern.body: The worked stone of the maze gives way to a natural cavern, its cracked earthen floor threaded with dead roots and dry scrub. A towering fungus rises here in tiers of broad violet caps, glowing faintly, and shelves of the same purple growth cling to the rough rock walls. Clusters of pale blue puffballs and slender luminous stalks sprout from the dirt, their cold light the only illumination. The air is close and damp, heavy with the smell of earth and spores.
desc.shieldmaze_pit_hall.title: The Pit Hall
desc.shieldmaze_pit_hall.body: A wide hall of worn floor tiles with square iron grates set into diamond-patterned insets. Freestanding torch posts burn among lengths of chain that hang and trail across the stones. Along one side the floor drops away into a sunken pit, its bottom heaped with dark refuse that glistens red where the torchlight reaches it. The whole place smells of rust and rot.
desc.shieldmaze_rack_room.title: The Rack
desc.shieldmaze_rack_room.body: A smaller cell of the torture block, walled in dark brick hung with grim plaques, torches guttering above. A low wooden rack stands at its center beneath a chained hanging-frame, and a skeleton lies stretched out on the boards, picked clean. Dried blood streaks the pale stone tiles, running toward the grated drains set into the floor. Whatever was done here was done often, and unhurried.
desc.shieldmaze_refectory_gallery.title: The Refectory Gallery
desc.shieldmaze_refectory_gallery.body: The far end of the dining hall, where a long crimson carpet woven with flowers stretches across the floor beneath the chandelier's glow. More of the hall's odd paintings hang here — a wide blue sky heaped with clouds among them — above shelves of crockery and a tall urn standing beside a doorway. Near one door, a mechanism sits rigged between the flagstones, a trap half-buried in the floor and waiting. Doorways open out on every side.
desc.shieldmaze_scaffold_chamber.title: The Scaffold Chamber
desc.shieldmaze_scaffold_chamber.body: A broad chamber given over to grim carpentry. Heavy timber frames rise from the flagstones like half-built gallows, one draped in pale canvas, another strung with a great leathery wing stretched wide like a trophy hide. Ladders lean against a raised wooden platform stacked with slabs of cut stone, and loose planks and rubble litter the floor between the frames. Torches burn along a wooden rail, and a banner bearing the red sigil hangs on the brick. In one wall, a heavy door worked with demonic ornament stands open onto darkness.
desc.shieldmaze_sealed_door.title: The Sealed Door
desc.shieldmaze_sealed_door.body: The widest room of the torture block, an open stretch of patterned stone with a drain grate at its heart and tables pushed against the walls. Along a raised ledge, four heavy buttons are set into the stonework in a row — red, blue, green, and yellow — beside a barred door that refuses to open. An iron cage stands near a pale banner daubed with a red sigil, and torchlight barely reaches across the empty floor. The buttons wait, and the door keeps its secret.
desc.shieldmaze_stair_antechamber.title: The Watcher's Antechamber
desc.shieldmaze_stair_antechamber.body: An antechamber floored with dark tiles inlaid in fine geometric patterns. Pale banners with the red sigil hang beside a guttering wall torch, and robed stone figures watch from the room's edges. Somewhere among the ornate tiles a trap lies ready, its plate all but invisible against the patterned floor. A broad stone stair descends through one doorway.
desc.shieldmaze_stair_chamber.title: Foot of the Stairs
desc.shieldmaze_stair_chamber.body: A bare stone chamber dominated by a heavy timber staircase that climbs along the wall behind a wooden rail, ragged sheets of pale cloth hanging from its frame. The floor tiles below lie shattered, shards and splinters strewn where they fell. An open doorway leads out, and little light finds its way in.
desc.shieldmaze_summoning_hall.title: The Summoning Hall
desc.shieldmaze_summoning_hall.body: A vast pillared hall, its ceiling lost in the dark. At its heart a wide circular dais rises between the columns, and across it a great pentagram has been daubed in blood, ringed by dozens of burning candles; a black lectern stands within the circle. Two corpses sprawl beside the design, left where they fell in their own dark stains. Pale statues line the walls among smears of red scrawl, and rubble lies heaped in the corners where masonry has come down.
desc.shieldmaze_temple_threshold.title: The Temple's Threshold
desc.shieldmaze_temple_threshold.body: Raw cave meets worked stone here. The temple's outer wall rises from the cavern floor in dressed blocks, an arched doorway set into it beneath a banner bearing the red sigil, warm candlelight spilling from within. Beyond the masonry the ground is bare cracked rock, and clusters of cave fungus glimmer violet and blue in the dark.
desc.shieldmaze_training_hall.title: The Training Hall
desc.shieldmaze_training_hall.body: A broad training hall whose floor has been churned to wet mud between islands of cracked flagstone, torchlight doubling itself in the standing water. An iron wheel chandelier hangs low on chains, flames guttering along its rim. Coiled straw archery targets stand on wooden posts along one wall, and wooden frames and weapon racks line another. At the room's heart the flagstones lie shattered and upheaved in a wide circle, as if beaten by years of drilling feet. Among the doorways leading out stands the heavy door of the maze's armory.
desc.shieldmaze_trapped_antechamber.body: A small stone antechamber pinched between two open temple doors, its checkered floor strewn with rubble and broken masonry. Shield plaques and white banners marked with the red sigil hang on the walls. At the room's heart the floor itself hides a mechanism — a trap laid into the paving, waiting for a careless step.
desc.shieldmaze_trapped_corridor.title: The Trapped Corridor
desc.shieldmaze_trapped_corridor.body: A corridor dressed like a temple approach: a long red runner laid over the stone tiles, pale banners marked with the red sigil, and an iron crest mounted high on the wall. A wooden bench stands beneath a candelabrum whose candles still burn, and small wooden doors wait beneath arched frames. But the welcome is a lie — a trap mechanism sits flush beneath the tiles, its workings built into the wall beside it, and a scatter of old bones lies close by where something once set it off.
desc.shieldmaze_trophy_room.title: The Trophy Room
desc.shieldmaze_trophy_room.body: The torturers' inner room, hidden behind the sealed door. Broad shallow steps descend to a stone floor where racks stand ready with their straps and winches, and the cult's takings are gathered in a torchlit corner: a stout chest, a stand of confiscated weapons, plunder heaped carelessly together. Among it all a knight's longsword lies set apart from the rest, its blade catching what little light there is.
desc.shieldmaze_unfinished_corner.title: The Unfinished Corner
desc.shieldmaze_unfinished_corner.body: A half-built annex where the maze simply runs out. A squat stone pillar rises from a stepped base, timber scaffolding stands hung with a lantern, and a beam-lined wall carries racks of hanging tools. The flagstone floor lies half-laid, trailing off into rubble, and where the masonry ends raw cave rock breaks through, studded with pale mushrooms that give off a faint blue glow. Candles burn in a stand against the dark.
desc.festival_drink_nook.title: The Drinking-Contest Nook
desc.festival_drink_nook.body: A snug nook tucked beneath the great arched city wall, sheltered by a stall with a shingled wooden roof. Its long trestle table is set for the drinking contest, crowded with jugs, cups, and a waiting bottle among scattered stools, while a cauldron steams over a small fire and barrels stand stacked against the stones.
desc.festival_square.title: The Festival Square
desc.festival_square.body: A vast cobbled plaza, its paving laid in great rings around a towering maypole trailing long ribbon streamers of every color. Strings of triangular pennants sway between banner poles, and scalloped bunting in orange and gold fences off the dancing ground. Trestle tables stand laden with bread and festival fare among barrels, benches, and a painted notice board on its easel. Covered wagons in blue and green canvas are drawn up at the edges, where autumn trees shed bright leaves over the stones and braziers glow beside striped stall canopies. Several streets and corners of the square lead out from here.
desc.festival_stage.title: The Festival Stage
desc.festival_stage.body: A pocket of the square given over to a broad wooden stage, its plank deck raised on a stout timber platform. Tall poles crowd around it, swallow-tailed flags in red and white snapping overhead, and a brightly painted poster board stands nearby. A stall under a striped canvas awning is set up close at hand, with barrels waiting in its shade.
desc.festival_training_yard.title: The Training Corner
desc.festival_training_yard.body: A quieter corner of the square at the foot of a stone tower roofed in fish-scale shingles, a round stone well tucked against its base. A straw training mannequin stands ready for festival sparring, and a wooden target board waits on its stand nearby. A plank table and bench, a broken-down cart, and stacked crates crowd the cobbles, while an autumn tree ringed in stone sheds orange leaves across the paving. Strings of colored bunting run overhead, and broad stone steps climb away past a stall under a blue-and-white striped awning.
desc.kencaves_bone_garden.title: The Bone Garden
desc.kencaves_bone_garden.body: A broad flat of pale, crack-glazed stone, hemmed in by dark rock where banks of violet shelf-fungus glow overhead. In a low pocket of teal growth, slender glowing caps stand over a human skeleton picked clean, half sunk in the moss-light. A small traveler's pouch lies abandoned on the bare stone, and a broken rockface offers handholds up onto higher ground. The air hangs still, sweet with spores.
desc.kencaves_boulder_gate.title: The Boulder Gate
desc.kencaves_boulder_gate.body: A slumped mass of fallen rock chokes half this chamber, squeezing the path beneath a fungus-hung wall. High overhead, honeycombed fans jut from the red-brown stone in violet rows, and a knobbled crust of pale nodules spreads across the rock like risen dough. Tulip-headed mushrooms glow white among lavender toadstools and green candle-stalks at the floor's edge. Beyond them a passage burrows on into the dark — the way out of these caves.
desc.kencaves_broad_shelf.title: The Broad Shelf
desc.kencaves_broad_shelf.body: A wide shelf of grey stone, its floor cracked into plates like dried mud. The edge falls away into blackness, and glowing fungi crowd the rim of the rock: clusters of blue and violet caps, shelf mushrooms stacked up a stony column. Out on the open floor a pale, bulbous mass has taken root, its knotted growths veined green and slick, spread across the stone like something alive. The cold fungal light barely dents the dark.
desc.kencaves_broken_hall.title: The Broken Hall
desc.kencaves_broken_hall.body: A hall of the old city, swallowed whole. Square pillars with arched panels still stand on a flagstone floor drifted deep with shattered masonry, sheets of cobweb strung between them. Heaps of collapsed stone lie everywhere — the hilt of a sword juts from one — and a stripped pedestal rises from the wreckage, whatever it once bore smashed to fragments around its base above a dark stain. Partway across, the flagstones simply end, torn off at a ragged edge above a black chasm. It smells of dust, old stone, and things long dry.
desc.kencaves_cracked_flats.title: The Cracked Flats
desc.kencaves_cracked_flats.body: A broad chamber floored in pale clay, cracked into plates like a dried riverbed. Constellations of tiny blue-white mushrooms sprinkle the flats, thickening around a glowing coral bush, and rose-violet bracket fans stack up the flank of a rock pillar. Trumpet stalks and a scatter of pale shards litter the low slabs where the floor rises. The air glitters faintly with drifting spores.
desc.kencaves_crossway.title: A Narrow Crossway
desc.kencaves_crossway.body: A tight throat of rock where several ways meet. Glowing mushrooms crowd the walls, pink parasols and columns of violet shelf-caps, above a trodden dirt floor.
desc.kencaves_dark_hollow.title: The Dark Hollow
desc.kencaves_dark_hollow.body: A wide hollow where the fungal light gives out. A great swell of collapsed rock rises from the floor, swallowing the faint glow of mushrooms clinging high on the walls. Somewhere in the gloom a corpse lies where it came to rest, one more body the city's fall dropped into the dark. The air hangs still and heavy.
desc.kencaves_daylight_breach.title: Under the Breach
desc.kencaves_daylight_breach.body: Pale shafts of daylight spill down through the torn earth overhead, cutting through the dust in long, slanting columns. They fall on a floor of sand and shattered stone, boulders heaped where the ceiling gave way. A cart lies wrecked against the rocks, tipped on its side with a wheel loose and its timbers scattered, dragged down whole when the city split. At the edges of the light, purple cave fungus dims to a faint smoulder.
desc.kencaves_fallen_market.title: The Fallen Market
desc.kencaves_fallen_market.body: Grey daylight falls in dusty shafts from the torn ground far overhead, lighting wreckage rained down from the city. A wooden cart lies smashed amid barrels, crates, and splintered planks, a loose wheel resting where it rolled to a stop. A striped canvas awning, some market stall's roof, lies draped over the rubble. The cracked stone floor is strewn with debris, and here the caves' blue fungal glow gives way to the pale light of the ruined world above.
desc.kencaves_fungal_descent.title: The Fungal Descent
desc.kencaves_fungal_descent.body: A slope of raw rock stairs down through the dark, its packed-earth floor cracked open by a fresh quake fissure. Glowing fungus crowds the walls: crinkled violet shelves, blue-capped toadstools on slender stalks, clusters of pale puffballs shining like scattered lanterns. Pink-fleshed caps nest in a hollow of the rock, and branching coral growths cling to the stone. The air hangs cold and damp, thick with spore-dust, and passages open off the slope into deeper dark.
desc.kencaves_fungal_terrace.title: The Fungal Terrace
desc.kencaves_fungal_terrace.body: A bank of glowing fungus climbs the cavern wall: violet shelf-caps stacked in crooked towers, pale blue toadstools in huddled clusters, branching teal growths like drowned coral. Beneath the glow a bald shelf of pale stone runs along the lip of a black drop, worn smooth and bare. Motes of blue light drift in the spore-thick air, and everything smells of damp rot and cold rock.
desc.kencaves_fungus_tower.title: The Fungus Tower
desc.kencaves_fungus_tower.body: A long hall of raw, pink-veined stone, its walls rising in creased, crystal-flecked folds. A dead trunk rears out of the floor, wound to its tip in tiers of violet shelf fungi that light the surrounding rock like a lamp-stand, green trumpet fungi clustered at its foot. Off among the stones a corpse lies where it fell, still and unburied in the fungal glow.
desc.kencaves_giants_cap.title: The Giant's Cap
desc.kencaves_giants_cap.body: A wide cavern floored in cracked, vein-patterned flowstone. At its heart a single monstrous mushroom rears up on a marbled blue-grey stalk, its dark cap spread wide as a wagon wheel, smaller violet-speckled caps crowding its foot. Shelf-fungus burns purple and ember-orange along the rock walls, and a slope of ochre boulders climbs toward a torn fragment of paved floor hanging high above — the underside of the fallen city. Blue motes drift everywhere like sparks that never land.
desc.kencaves_glowing_pinch.title: A Glowing Pinch
desc.kencaves_glowing_pinch.body: A narrow pinch of passage squeezed between fungus-crusted rock. Violet shelf-fungus and beads of blue puffball light glow along the walls above a dry, cracked clay floor, marking the way between wider caverns.
desc.kencaves_knights_vigil.title: The Knight's Vigil
desc.kencaves_knights_vigil.body: A grand ruined hall, its gothic pillars still standing beneath a ceiling of raw cave rock. Rubble and dust drift across the flagstones, around smashed fragments of carved archway and a wide wooden bowl still balanced on its pedestal. Against one wall a shrine endures: the statue of an armored knight kneels with head bowed over a spiked mace, a great cracked brazier-bowl at its side, the whole of it veiled in cobweb. Where the outer wall has burst, rubble fans across the floor and a slick of green slime crawls over the stone, studded with pale, egg-like nodules that gleam in the fungal light seeping through the breach.
desc.kencaves_lantern_nook.title: The Lantern Nook
desc.kencaves_lantern_nook.body: A cramped pocket of cave where the walls pinch close. Great round mushrooms bulge from the green-stained rock like glass floats, glowing cold sea-teal, while a column of honeycombed shelf fungi climbs the stone in violet tiers. Pink-capped parasols and beads of white puffball crowd the trodden earth between, and pale drip-fungus fringes the ledges overhead. Everything here is lit by its own soft shine.
desc.kencaves_mushroom_grove.title: The Mushroom Grove
desc.kencaves_mushroom_grove.body: A cavern claimed wholly by fungus. Towering stalks rise ringed with stacked shelf-caps that glow violet and blue; parasol mushrooms flush pink among beds of tiny white puffballs and pale trumpets. Luminous spores drift in the air above a floor of packed, fissured stone. Everything here shines with its own cold light.
desc.kencaves_slimed_bones.title: The Slimed Bones
desc.kencaves_slimed_bones.body: A cramped gully floored with cracked earth, hemmed in by rock hung with luminous growth: teal-capped mushrooms, pale swaying bulbs, a tower of violet shelf-fungus climbing the wall. Among them lies a scatter of old bones glazed in slime, gleaming wetly in the fungal light.
desc.kencaves_spore_garden.title: The Spore Garden
desc.kencaves_spore_garden.body: A broad cavern in full fungal bloom. Stacks of crinkled violet shelf-fungus climb the rock walls, and great purple-hooded toadstools rise out of a drifting haze of spores, ringed by tube-like fungal reeds and pale coral growths. Clusters of glowing puffballs scatter cold blue light across a floor of dry, cracked clay. The air is heavy, sweet with rot and spore-dust.
desc.kencaves_spore_haze.title: The Spore Haze
desc.kencaves_spore_haze.body: A rounded chamber thick with drifting spores, glowing motes hanging in the still air. Clusters of purple shelf fungus bloom from the walls, each wreathed in a pale cyan mist of its own making. Beneath the haze the floor is broken, mottled stone, raw rock in every shade of bruise. The whole room breathes with slow, cold light.
desc.kencaves_spore_passage.title: The Spore-Lit Passage
desc.kencaves_spore_passage.body: A winding throat of bare rock, its walls studded with clumps of purple fungus that glow like embers in the dark, spores drifting between them. Abandoned belongings lie dropped where the passage opens out.
desc.kencaves_stone_gully.title: The Stone Gully
desc.kencaves_stone_gully.body: A wide gully worn between shoulders of rock, its floor a pale crazed stone like dried mud. Slender trumpet fungi stand in yellow-green ranks among sprays of tiny white buttons, and a coral-blue bush glows against the dark. Violet rosettes bloom on the ledges above, where a broken face of rock offers a scramble to a higher shelf. Spore-motes hang glinting in the still air.
desc.kencaves_under_the_rent.title: Beneath the Rent
desc.kencaves_under_the_rent.body: Shafts of pale light slant down from the rent torn in the ground far overhead, falling across boulders newly ripped loose in the quake. Broken stone lies heaped over a cracked floor, and a fresh fissure splits the ground where the earth gave way. Beyond the reach of the light, the chamber sinks into total dark.
desc.kencaves_webbed_hollow.title: The Webbed Hollow
desc.kencaves_webbed_hollow.body: A rough hollow of mossy stone, its floor dropping away over a slick lip of rock. A dead stalk rises through the chamber, wound round with shelf mushrooms glowing blue and violet, and fat bracket fans shine from the folds of the wall. Pale toadstools and a tuft of green coral-weed crowd the stones, spore-motes drifting in the fungal light. Old webbing clings in sheets where the rock creases inward.
desc.kencaves_wreckage_nook.title: The Splintered Cache
desc.kencaves_wreckage_nook.body: A cramped pocket of raw rock, lit by the cold glow of cave fungus. Violet shelf caps crowd the walls in thick clusters, and a stand of teal-glowing mushrooms rises from a seam in the floor among pale, coral-like growths. Below them the wreckage of the fall: a barrel burst open on the stone, a crate stove in, splintered planks fanned across the ground. Something worth salvaging may yet lie in the debris. Spores drift and glitter in the fungal light.
desc.neathholm_broken_frames.title: The Broken Frames
desc.neathholm_broken_frames.body: A short drop of rock at the water's edge, where wrecked timber frames lean half-collapsed into the shallows. Clusters of round blue mushroom caps glow among the stones.
desc.neathholm_canopy_hut.title: Under the Mushroom Canopy
desc.neathholm_canopy_hut.body: A pocket of packed earth sheltered beneath the caps of colossal violet mushrooms, their glow washing over everything. A hut of scaled hide, its crown bristling with horn spikes, stands beside a fire where a lantern hangs from a tripod of poles, with ground kept clear nearby for a trader's wares. Pink toadstools cluster on the slope, blue growths crust the rocks, and dark lake water stirs past the ledge.
desc.neathholm_cavern_shore.title: The Cavern Shore
desc.neathholm_cavern_shore.body: A wide shelf of cracked stone and mud at the edge of the dark lake, the path threading between stretches of black water. A rock spur carries a tower of ruffled violet shelf-fungus stacked like plates, and mushrooms glow in blue and pink clusters along the waterline. Broken plank rafts lie beached in the shallows among pale coral-like growths. Between the rocks, a cave mouth leads back to the caves at the Shield Maze.
desc.neathholm_cookfire_terrace.title: The Cookfire Terrace
desc.neathholm_cookfire_terrace.body: A wide stone terrace above the lake, warm with cook-fires ringed in stone. A long table and benches sit laid with plates and bowls, and a pale hide awning slopes between spear-hafts beside a crackling fire. Torches burn amid woven mats, heaped hides, and a forgotten bag or two. Down the slope, drifts of tiny moon-pale mushrooms and thick coils of violet fungus glow at the water's edge.
desc.neathholm_feathered_hut.title: The Feather-Crowned Hut
desc.neathholm_feathered_hut.body: A small terrace holding a tall hut of stitched hide and scale, its peak crowned with a fan of golden blades like enormous feathers; a second hut, a low dome of scaled hide, hunches close by. A cooking bowl rests near the entrance, a woven mat lies spread on the ground, and a pale lantern glows on its post. Bone stakes fence the ledge, violet shelf fungi crust the rockface, and dark water glimmers past the edge.
desc.neathholm_fungal_path.title: The Fungal Path
desc.neathholm_fungal_path.body: A wide dirt path running between walls of rough rock crowded with luminous growth: fat shelves of purple fungus stacked like coral, a bright violet mushroom raised on its stalk, small pale buttons scattered underfoot. Wet veins in the stone floor catch the glow and shine faintly blue. The path runs a short way before the rock closes it off.
desc.neathholm_giant_mushroom_hut.title: Beneath the Giant Mushroom
desc.neathholm_giant_mushroom_hut.body: A snug hut of woven, scaled hide standing in the shadow of a giant mushroom, its vast violet cap glowing over the hollow like a lantern. A small campfire burns before the entrance under a cooking tripod, a pot and packed bags set down beside it. Behind the hut the rock shelves away into the dark lake, its edge crusted with pale blue growths that shine faintly in the water.
desc.neathholm_gravel_spit.title: The Gravel Spit
desc.neathholm_gravel_spit.body: A short tongue of gravel and packed sand running out into the dark water, ending among boulders that shoulder up from the shallows. Their flanks carry a faint blue glimmer, and beyond them the lake closes the way.
desc.neathholm_great_hut_terrace.title: The Great Hut's Terrace
desc.neathholm_great_hut_terrace.body: A wide terrace of cracked stone before the grandest hut in the village, a tall cone of scaled hides with its peak dressed in golden fronds. Woven mats, a rolled rug, and broad clay bowls sit by its entrance, and racks of lashed poles stand ready for drying the catch. Standing torches and a small cookfire hold back the gloom, while the cap of an enormous violet mushroom glows over the terrace edge like a lamp. Past the rocks, plank walkways reach out over the dark water.
desc.neathholm_high_perch.title: A Perch Among the Caps
desc.neathholm_high_perch.body: A cramped ledge high among the stems of giant violet mushrooms, their glowing caps spread overhead like awnings. Blue shelf fungi froth over the rock, and a heavy sack rests where the path drops away. Between the stalks, the hide roofs and torch flames of the village glimmer far underfoot.
desc.neathholm_lakeshore.title: The Water's Edge
desc.neathholm_lakeshore.body: A broad stretch of dark sand where the cavern floor slides under the lake, thin sheets of water washing back and forth across it. A cluster of fat, blue-glowing mushrooms sprouts near the waterline, ringed by pale buttons no bigger than knuckles. Shelves of violet fungus crust the rock above the shore, and their light lies broken on the ripples. The air is damp and tastes of cold stone.
desc.neathholm_lakeside_camp.title: The Lakeside Camp
desc.neathholm_lakeside_camp.body: The village's common ground, a broad shelf of trodden earth on the shore of the dark lake. Fire pits ringed with stones burn among hide tents and tripod frames, and long plank tables with benches stand set with bowls and platters, as if for a shared meal. Standing torches and a pale awning of stretched hide mark out the camp. All around, the rock is furred with glowing fungus — clusters of blue buttons, violet caps, pale trumpet cups — and a bare stone spit reaches into the black water, a lone campfire flickering at its tip.
desc.neathholm_mushroom_shallows.title: The Glowing Shallows
desc.neathholm_mushroom_shallows.body: A low shelf of sand and rock at the lake's edge, water spreading over it in a thin, restless film. A knot of glowing indigo mushrooms leans out of a rocky hump here, dripping soft light into the shallows, tiny white caps clustered at its feet. Higher up, banks of purple shelf fungus glow along the cavern wall. Everything glistens.
desc.neathholm_raft_landing.title: The Raft Landing
desc.neathholm_raft_landing.body: A narrow patch of wet sand at the water's edge. A plank raft lies drawn up here, its deck still laden with worn paddles and poles, and glowing mushrooms bloom against a stone spur crusted with pale ruffled fungus.
desc.neathholm_rock_landing.title: The Rocky Landing
desc.neathholm_rock_landing.body: A shelf of bare rock above still, black water. A column of violet fungus shelves rises stacked like plates beside pale trumpet sprouts, blue caps glow on the far rise, and a rough timber walkway spans the dark water beyond.
desc.neathholm_shore_steps.title: Steps to the Strand
desc.neathholm_shore_steps.body: A few worn steps of rock dropping toward a dark strand where slow water laps at scattered stones. A fishing net lies spread on the sand beside a slatted box, and firelight from the village flickers on the slope above.
desc.neathholm_tent_nook.title: Among the Tents
desc.neathholm_tent_nook.body: A sheltered nook of the camp, in the lee of a tall hut of woven scales. A dark hide tent stands pitched beside a stone-ringed cookfire, close to a long plank table and benches laid with bowls and platters. A clay jug sits among the stores, and the trodden earth gives way to a meadow of softly glowing blue fungus at the nook's edge.
desc.neathholm_torch_stair.title: The Torchlit Stair
desc.neathholm_torch_stair.body: A short climb of packed stone, lit by torches on crooked stands. Violet mushrooms glow along the way, and the scaled roof of a great hide tent rises close by.
desc.neathholm_torchlit_rise.title: The Torchlit Rise
desc.neathholm_torchlit_rise.body: A short climb over bare rock, rising from the camp's fires toward the huts above. A standing torch lights the way, and mist drifts across the slope where violet-capped mushrooms glow against the honeycombed stone.
desc.neathholm_trading_post.title: The Trading Post
desc.neathholm_trading_post.body: A dome hut of hide and scale stands over a stone-ringed cook-fire, horn-like spines jutting from its shell. A trader's stall crowds the ground beside it: barrels and clay pots, bulging sacks, a pumpkin, a cauldron slung on a tripod, a bench, and a long wooden rack. Rows of thorny cavern blossoms glow a deep violet nearby, and pale mushrooms shine on the slope above.
desc.neathholm_village_common.title: The Village Common
desc.neathholm_village_common.body: The open heart of Neathholm, a broad sweep of cavern floor ringed by huts of stitched hide and scale. A long plank table with benches stands set with plates and a jug, and fire pits crackle among staked torches and woven mats. Lean-to awnings of stretched hide shelter racks and gear, while fish boxes and baskets wait by the water's edge. Over it all a colossal violet mushroom spreads its glowing cap, and smaller purple caps sprout from the stone.
detail.painting_01: A painting of a woman lying in repose
detail.painting_02: A painting: portrait of a young woman with long golden hair
detail.painting_03: A painting dominated by blue: a woman in deep blue robes, head bowed
detail.painting_04: A painting dominated by red: two figures in dark red robes
detail.painting_05: A painting of a dim chamber with two seated figures
detail.painting_06: A painting dominated by green: a lush garden
detail.painting_07: A painting of a walled city on the water
detail.painting_08: A painting dominated by gold: a couple dancing in golden finery
detail.painting_09: A painting of a town bathed in red light
detail.painting_10: A painting of a wide blue sky with clouds
detail.painting_11: A painting of a sunlit street of brick houses
detail.painting_12: A painting of a green woodland glade
detail.painting_set: A wall hung with several paintings
